intended_behavior: Current active-stack winners and normalized economic facts feed generated strategy.
upstream_inputs: active playset; current winning PDXScript objects; benefit policy matrix
safety_gates: winner provenance; blocker accounting; consumer proof status
known_gap: Canonical dataset handles and stale-source keys still need continuous validation.
next_action: Audit winner selection, normalization, filters, and generated-source feedback on every regeneration.

intended_behavior: Repair energy, mineral, consumer-goods, food, and alloy deficits through earned income before discretionary growth.
upstream_inputs: vanilla deficit/monthly-income/fleet-power triggers; relative standards dataset
engine_consumer: 37 mutually exclusive colony/fleet repair subplans plus shared income-and-stockpile runway gates
safety_gates: resource-use gates; colony-scale headroom; fleet replacement burden; food reserve exception; market purchases cannot satisfy income gates
known_gap: Runtime recovery speed and band calibration remain unproven for the current playtest.
next_action: Measure deficit duration, research throttling, rebuild time, and recovery across archetypes and empire sizes.

intended_behavior: Preserve consumer-goods runway and build research capacity only when support resources are safe.
upstream_inputs: research-capacity datasets; vanilla research-zone potential gates
safety_gates: staid_research_construction_priority_ready; source potential/allow
known_gap: The exact engine score composition among coefficient, additive weight, and ai_resource_production still needs runtime proof.
next_action: Reconstruct candidate scoring and inspect research-world build choices in playtest saves.

intended_behavior: Bias eligible buildings and districts by modeled output without inventing inactive building ai_weight control.
upstream_inputs: economic valuation; consumer policy; source hard gates
safety_gates: potential/allow preserved; military-capacity excluded
known_gap: Player Planetary Automation files are not proven AI-empire construction consumers.
next_action: Trace actual candidate selection and keep automation policy separate unless a call site is proven.

intended_behavior: Align construction pressure with research, forge, factory, mining, energy, food, unity, trade, and special-world roles.
upstream_inputs: active colony types; role target dataset; vanilla bottleneck trigger
engine_consumer: designation potential plus hard zone/building eligibility
safety_gates: fortress economy/colony-count/threat/topology readiness; research-world naval exclusion
known_gap: Fortress waste and non-bottleneck placement are hard-gated, but the remaining broad designation choice and special-world role selection are not yet reconstructed.
next_action: Audit every remaining colony type winner, selection weight, and role-specific eligible candidate set.

intended_behavior: Reserve alloys, minerals, and strategic resources for viable construction and fleet pipelines.
upstream_inputs: vanilla and mod expenditure categories
safety_gates: deficit gates; positive-alloy fleet gate; defensive emergency bypass; prerequisite readiness
known_gap: The base ship and upgrade budgets now stop during unaffordable peacetime deficits; overlap with mod-specific expenditure categories still needs runtime audit.
next_action: Test simultaneous fleet, planet, and megastructure demand across positive, deficit, and wartime emergency states.

intended_behavior: Spend capped influence on claims/expansion and limit Director market activity to cap-prevention overflow sales.
upstream_inputs: influence pressure; vanilla market_resource_price; resource_stockpile_percent; Gigas Kugelblitz storage stages
engine_consumer: claim ai_weight plus Director-owned 90%-of-cap overflow sale and storage-cap investment gate; no Director market-buy path
safety_gates: claim viability; no deficit; positive earned income; fixed reserve; 90% actual storage cap
known_gap: Vanilla AI emergency buying and diplomatic trade composition remain engine-side; Director production gates require earned income as well as stockpile.
next_action: Inventory enclave, subject/federation, irregular-event, liability-reduction, and diplomatic trade channels; observe whether emergency buying persists after repair income becomes available.

intended_behavior: Recognize boxed-in empires and convert spatial constraint into expansion or conquest pressure.
upstream_inputs: border access; colony sites; claims; relative power
engine_consumer: expansion budgets plus boxed-in claim expenditure
safety_gates: available sites; claim legality; pacifist exclusion; influence reserve
known_gap: Boxed-in empires with fewer than five colonies now strongly fund legal claims, but no proven direct consumer chooses and starts the resulting war.
next_action: Trace a live boxed-in case from claim purchase through usable war goal, preparation, and declaration.

intended_behavior: Choose legal, profitable, weak targets and escalate when peaceful expansion is exhausted.
upstream_inputs: relative power; claims; war goals; borders; threat
engine_consumer: claim budget only; none proven for direct declaration
safety_gates: war legality; fleet/economic readiness; target value
known_gap: The claim/CB prerequisite receives boxed-in urgency, but Director still does not directly rank targets or declare ordinary expansion wars.
next_action: Audit personalities, diplomatic actions, casus belli, war goals, and the hardcoded declaration chain before any forced-war implementation.

intended_behavior: Adapt aggression, cooperation, rivalry, and pact behavior to ethics, power, and strategic need.
upstream_inputs: vanilla personalities and diplomatic action weights
safety_gates: ethics; genocidal legality; subject status
known_gap: Personality and diplomatic-action objects remain intentionally unmodified and therefore cannot realize several Director pressures.
next_action: Reconstruct active personality and diplomatic-action winners, then patch only source-proven bottlenecks.

intended_behavior: Scale fleet spending to threat and payoff without bankrupting research or civilian production.
upstream_inputs: relative power; naval capacity; alloy income/runway; war state
engine_consumer: economic plan and alloy ship expenditure budget
safety_gates: positive alloy income; core deficit; defensive emergency; approved military routes
known_gap: Runtime fleet-manager reinforcement behavior and fleet splitting remain outside current proof.
next_action: Audit fleet templates, reinforcement, merging, and military construction against economic runway.

intended_behavior: Treat bosses and lethal fauna separately from ordinary enemy empires and remember failed attacks.
upstream_inputs: vanilla boss flags; active-stack outlier fleet flags; battle-loss on_action
engine_consumer: boss military-power defines plus defeat escalation
safety_gates: BOSS/ULTRA_BOSS thresholds; exact survivor flag escalation
known_gap: Only confirmed outlier flags receive adaptive post-loss escalation; the full active-stack boss inventory is not yet classified.
next_action: Classify every is_boss/is_ultra_boss entity and verify AI pathing after a failed attack.

intended_behavior: Preserve viable component/combat-computer choices across SFT, NSC3, ESC, and Gigas.
upstream_inputs: Spacefleet Tactica parity sources; active component graph
safety_gates: component legality; add-on equivalence
known_gap: Section templates, ship-size edits, and advanced modded hull designs remain unverified.
next_action: Run ship graph validation and audit generated designs per unlocked hull tier.

intended_behavior: Research economic prerequisites, fleet payoff, megastructure, and modded unlock routes in viable order.
upstream_inputs: route override dataset; prerequisites; unlock flags
safety_gates: route prerequisites; resource readiness; feature flags
known_gap: Competing routes and archetype-inapplicable technologies need a full negative-path audit.
next_action: Validate every route prerequisite graph and empire applicability gate.

intended_behavior: Choose traditions, ascension perks, and ascension paths that fit the empire and current strategic bottleneck.
upstream_inputs: route overrides; perk/tradition prerequisites
safety_gates: prerequisites and source potential
known_gap: Current overrides push selected routes but do not yet express a mutually coherent empire-specific ascension plan.
next_action: Audit all path exclusions, prerequisites, synergies, and extreme-empire preferences.

intended_behavior: Sequence high-return megastructures only when prerequisites, economy, and sites are ready.
upstream_inputs: ROI datasets; site limits; route graph
safety_gates: prerequisites; site availability; resource runway
known_gap: Concurrent projects, repair/upgrade decisions, and unique mod chains need adversarial sequencing tests.
next_action: Audit each chain from technology through site, budget, build, and upgrade completion.

intended_behavior: Convert economy and fleet production for real crises without permanently starving development.
upstream_inputs: crisis country types; relative power; war goals
engine_consumer: threat events and crisis economic subplans
safety_gates: threat classification; economic readiness; cooldowns
known_gap: Vanilla and modded crises, fallen empires, and pseudo-crisis bosses are not yet exhaustively separated.
next_action: Inventory crisis actors and verify response activation, target legality, and recovery after threat removal.

intended_behavior: Build shipyards and static defense where strategically useful without crowding civilian research worlds.
upstream_inputs: route dataset; chokepoints; threat state
engine_consumer: starbase building/module ai_weight and economic plans
safety_gates: deficit safety; threat readiness; source potential
known_gap: Chokepoint value, defensive platform affordability, and modded starbase slot competition need validation.
next_action: Audit module/building selection at border, shipyard, trade, and interior starbases.

intended_behavior: Use bombardment and armies appropriate to conquest objectives and empire ethics.
upstream_inputs: bombardment stances; army and transport AI
safety_gates: ethics; civic; legal stance
known_gap: Army recruitment, transport escort, invasion thresholds, and planet target choice are not Director-owned.
next_action: Audit army, invasion, transport, and bombardment consumers as one end-to-end conquest lane.

intended_behavior: Use correct upkeep/resources, jobs, growth, unity, and ascension routes for gestalts and individual machines.
upstream_inputs: country_uses_* triggers; machine/hive route gates
safety_gates: consumer-goods and food use gates; owner type
known_gap: Individual machines, rogue servitors, assimilators, exterminators, and hive variants need separate strategy matrices.
next_action: Build an archetype capability matrix and add negative tests for inapplicable resources and routes.

intended_behavior: Favor rapid conquest and war economy for purifiers, exterminators, swarms, and other no-diplomacy empires.
upstream_inputs: civics; personality; war legality
safety_gates: economy runway; target power; total-war legality
known_gap: No dedicated direct target/declaration logic or civic-specific strategic plan is yet proven.
next_action: Audit civic triggers, total-war goals, fleet timing, and post-conquest stabilization.

intended_behavior: Pursue habitats, diplomacy, vassalization, and internal scaling when offensive war is illegal or undesirable.
upstream_inputs: ethics; war philosophy; expansion sites
safety_gates: war legality; habitat prerequisites; diplomacy access
known_gap: Alternative boxed-in growth paths are not yet coherently ranked against claims and war pressure.
next_action: Define legal expansion ladders for pacifist and isolationist states.

intended_behavior: Prioritize trade, branch offices, commercial pacts, and compact growth without sacrificing research support.
upstream_inputs: trade income; authority; branch-office and diplomacy surfaces
safety_gates: market access; trade capacity; diplomacy legality
known_gap: Branch-office target selection, commercial pacts, criminal syndicates, and trade-policy transitions are not fully modeled.
next_action: Audit trade and branch-office consumers plus megacorp-specific influence spending.

intended_behavior: Avoid planet-only assumptions and support Arkship, Wayline, and nomadic economic surfaces.
upstream_inputs: 4.4 Arkship/Wayline sources
engine_consumer: source objects preserved; limited Director routing
safety_gates: country type; colony ownership; special resources
known_gap: Several colony, construction, budget, and war assumptions still require nomad-specific negative paths.
next_action: Trace every planet-scoped trigger and construction lane for nomad applicability.

intended_behavior: Respect subject restrictions and value loyalty, specialization, contracts, integration, and defensive obligations.
upstream_inputs: subject contracts; diplomatic actions; overlord holdings
safety_gates: contract legality; loyalty; independence status
known_gap: Subject and overlord strategic decisions have not yet received a dedicated Director pass.
next_action: Inventory subject/federation consumers and define empire-role-specific priorities.

intended_behavior: Avoid breaking origin-specific economies, planets, ships, event gates, and victory paths.
upstream_inputs: origin/civic/event gates in winning objects
safety_gates: source gates; event flags; origin ownership
known_gap: Preserving source gates prevents illegal candidates but does not prove strategically correct origin-specific planning.
next_action: Create a capability matrix for every active-stack origin that changes the economic or military substrate.

intended_behavior: Ensure Director overrides the intended object and preserves required parent-mod behavior.
upstream_inputs: Irony load order; active playset; generated file audit
safety_gates: winner checks; reference resolution; forbidden surfaces
known_gap: Static winner proof cannot establish runtime semantics for every modded object.
next_action: Re-run conflict/reference audits after each generator change and add targeted smoke checks for high-risk surfaces.

intended_behavior: Observe whether strategic pressures activate and produce the intended economic, construction, diplomatic, and military outcomes.
upstream_inputs: logs; saves; observer checkpoints; user playtest reports
engine_consumer: none at runtime unless observer tooling is explicitly enabled
safety_gates: commands_at_date disabled outside approved runs
known_gap: Current changes are statically validated; the ongoing user playtest is the primary runtime evidence for this build.
next_action: Define save/log checkpoints for deficits, build choices, war declarations, boss attacks, and archetype behavior.
